hibernate-mapping.query: Select companyBankAccount from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyBankAccount as companyBankAccount inner join fetch companyBankAccount.Company as comp where companyBankAccount.StatusCd=:statusCd and comp.SourceSystemCd=:sourceSystemCd

Select employeeBankAccount from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EmployeeBankAccount as employeeBankAccount inner join fetch employeeBankAccount.BankAccount as bankAccount inner join fetch employeeBankAccount.Employee as employee where employeeBankAccount.StatusCd='Active' and employee.Company.SourceCompanyId=:sourceCompanyId and employee.Company.SourceSystemCd=:sourceSystemCd

Select compService from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as compService inner join fetch compService.Company as comp where compService.Service=:serviceCd and compService.Company.SourceSystemCd=:sourceSystemCd and compService.StatusCd=:statusCd
